tasks.text: Raise vehicles, using hydraulic jacks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remount wheels onto vehicles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Unbolt and remove wheels from vehicles, using lug wrenches or other hand or power tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Place wheels on balancing machines to determine counterweights required to balance wheels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify tire size and ply and inflate tires accordingly.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Replace valve stems and remove puncturing objects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Hammer required counterweights onto rims of wheels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Reassemble tires onto wheels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Seal punctures in tubeless tires by inserting adhesive material and expanding rubber plugs into punctures, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect tire casings for defects, such as holes or tears.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Locate punctures in tubeless tires by visual inspection or by immersing inflated tires in water baths and observing air bubbles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Glue tire patches over ruptures in tire casings, using rubber cement.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assist mechanics and perform various mechanical duties, such as changing oil or checking and replacing batteries.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Rotate tires to different positions on vehicles, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean and tidy up the shop.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Buff defective areas of inner tubes, using scrapers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Order replacements for tires or tubes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Separate tubed tires from wheels, using rubber mallets and metal bars or mechanical tire changers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inflate inner tubes and immerse them in water to locate leaks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean sides of whitewall tires.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare rims and wheel drums for reassembly by scraping, grinding, or sandblasting.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply rubber cement to buffed tire casings prior to vulcanization process.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Patch tubes with adhesive rubber patches or seal rubber patches to tubes, using hot vulcanizing plates.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Drive automobile or service trucks to industrial sites to provide services or respond to emergency calls.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
